info.name: LeaveTrackerAPI
info.description: Postman collection for LeaveTracker API routes with demo data and required params.

request.description: Public route to verify API is running.

Required body: name, email, password, contactNo, joiningDate. Optional: designation.
Optional mobile headers: x-app-id, x-device-id (x-device-id required when x-app-id is present).

exec: const token = data?.data?.token || data?.token || data?.data?.accessToken || data?.accessToken || data?.jwt;

request.description:
Required body: email, password, role (ADMIN | MANAGER | EMPLOYEE).
Optional mobile headers: x-app-id, x-device-id (x-device-id required when x-app-id is present).

body.raw:
{
  "policyName": "Default Company Policy",
  "leaveTypeIds": ["{{leaveTypeId}}"],
  "accrualRules": "Monthly accrual enabled.",
  "carryForwardRules": "Max 10 days.",
  "probationRules": "No leave in first 30 days."
}

request.description: Required body: policyName, leaveTypeIds (array of ObjectId).

body.raw:
{
  "policyName": "Updated Leave Policy",
  "leaveTypeIds": ["{{leaveTypeId}}"],
  "accrualRules": "Quarterly accrual rule updated.",
  "carryForwardRules": "Carry forward up to 5 days.",
  "probationRules": "Leave allowed after 60 days."
}

request.description: Required body: holidayName, date, type (PUBLIC | RESTRICTED | OPTIONAL).
Required body fields: organization.organizationName, organization.timezone, organization.fiscalYearStart.
Required body: action (APPROVE | REJECT), employeeId, leaveType.

query.description: Optional. Omit to get all employees' leave balances.

request.description: Admin can fetch leave balances for all employees, or filter by employeeId.
Returns total employees, active employees, employees on leave today, pending request count, consumed leaves per employee, and monthly applied/approved leave counts for the current year.
Returns available leave count, pending/approved request counts, upcoming holidays count with holiday list, and leave type breakdown for the authenticated employee.
Returns leave balances for the authenticated employee only.

query.description: Optional. Filters within the manager's team only.

request.description: Returns leave requests for the logged-in manager's team members only.
Approve or reject a pending leave request for a team member. Required body: action (APPROVE | REJECT), employeeId, leaveType.

query.description: Optional. Omit to get all team members' leave balances. If provided, must be a team member.

request.description: Returns leave balances for the logged-in manager's team members only. Same response shape as admin leave-balances.
Returns total team members, pending requests, team members on leave today, and upcoming week leave count.
